steps.title: Write the profit equation
steps.content: Let $x$ be the number of audio guides rented. The revenue is $18x$, and the expenses are $126$, so the profit equation is $$558=18x-126$$

steps.title: Solve for the rentals
steps.content: Add $126$ to both sides, then divide by $18$: $$684=18x$$ $$\frac{684}{18}=x$$ The answer is 38.
